description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior features a mix of light gray and white surfaces, with large windows providing ample natural light to the interior. A driveway leads to a covered carport on one side, while a small landscaped area with a tree and hedges adds greenery to the front yard. The house is set back from a wide street, with a sidewalk and low brick walls marking the property boundary. The main entrance is recessed and partially sheltered, offering a subtle but welcoming entryway. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding urban environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a carport, set behind a landscaped front yard and low brick walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, driveway, and landscaped yard with a tree and hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tree, brick wall, and the depth of the house extending away from the street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, additional windows, and the full width of the property boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the sidewalk, entry path, and the house's compact footprint.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a simple door, partial overhang, and direct access from the driveway and sidewalk
